goal: Enable the sales team to position the new analytics module, handle common objections, and close deals in the first 90 days.

extensions.document_title: Analytics Module Launch — Sales Enablement Kit
extensions.one_sentence_thesis: The new analytics module delivers 3x faster query performance at 40% lower cost than the incumbent, with a migration path that takes under two weeks.
key_takeaways: Query performance benchmarked at 3x faster than Competitor A on identical datasets
Pricing undercuts incumbent by 40% at the 500-seat tier
Two-week migration path with zero-downtime cutover for existing customers
Three enterprise beta customers achieved full ROI within 60 days
Top objection is data residency — handled by new EU region launched in March
